hero.badge: 🏆 Top Paving Contractor in the USA — 3 Years Running
hero.eyebrow: Built on Quality. Driven by Pride.
hero.title: Professional Paving Solutions
hero.subtitle: Central Ohio's trusted asphalt, concrete & excavation contractor since 1999. Quality craftsmanship for residential and commercial projects — delivered faster and at lower cost than the competition.

introduction.title: Transforming Properties with Expert Paving Solutions
introduction.lead: For over 26 years, Neff Paving has been the trusted choice for property owners throughout Central Ohio who demand excellence in every project. As a two-time Top Paving Contractor in the country, we outpace the competition and deliver quality asphalt services at lower costs. From residential driveways that enhance curb appeal to large-scale commercial installations, we bring unmatched expertise, premium materials, and personalized service to every job.

points.title: Quality Guaranteed
points.description: Premium materials, advanced equipment, and skilled craftsmen ensure your project exceeds expectations.

points.title: Licensed & Insured
points.description: Fully licensed and insured, with workers' compensation and state contractor licensing for your peace of mind.

points.title: Fast Response
points.description: Instant estimates, online contract enrollment, secure Stripe payments, and flexible scheduling around your needs.

note.text: Quick response guaranteed — most estimates approved and scheduled within 2 hours.

statCards.label: Online Support
statCards.description: Always available when you need us
